# How to read Cis form Encode and Trans from Gtex and merge them as Reg variant : Note there is Diff Btw CisEQTL from GTEX and Cis from Encode 
# I did write this code in Bash
R --vanilla -q << 'EOF'

BASE      <- "/home/jupyter/Chapter2_Azadeh_01072026"
GENO      <- "/home/jupyter/arrays_white"
ANNOT_DIR <- file.path(Base, "annotation")

dir.create(ANNOT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE , recursive = TRUE)

# ============================================================
# STEP 1: Download ENCODE cCREs (GRCh38)
# ============================================================
cat("=== STEP 1: Download ENCODE cCREs ===\n")

ccre_file <- file.path (ANNOT_DIR, "GRCh38-cCREs.bed")

if (!file.exists(ccre_file) ){
cat("Downloading ENCODE cCREs...\n")
download.file (
    url      = "https://downloads.wenglab.org/Registry-V3/GRCh38-cCREs.bed",
    destfile = ccre_file,
    mode     = "wb",
    quiet    = FALSE
)
} else {
cat("Already exists:", ccre_file, "\n")
}

# ============================================================
# STEP 2: Load and clean ENCODE cCREs
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 2: Load ENCODE cCREs ===\n")

ccre <- fread (ccre_file, header =FALSE, 
select = 1:3, 
col.names =c("CHR", "START", "END"))

# Keep only autosomes, strip "chr" prefix

ccre <- ccre [grep("^chr[0-9]+$"), CHR]
ccre[, CHR:= as.integer(sub("^chr", "", CHR))]
ccre <- ccre[!is.na(CHR & CHR >=1L & CHR <=22L)]
setkey (ccre, CHR, START, END)

cat("ENCODE cCRE regions:", nrow(ccre), "\n")

# ============================================================
# STEP 3: Load array variants from BIM file
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 3: Load array variants ===\n")

bim <- fread(paste0(GENO, ".bim"), header = FALSE, 
col.names = c("CHR", "ID", "CM", "POS", "A1", "A2"))

bim[, CHR:= as.integer(CHR)]
bim <- bim[!is.na(CHR) & CHR >= 1L & CHR <= 22L]

# For foverlaps we need START and END (point interval: POS to POS)
# SNP become one pair interval

bim[, START:= POS]
bim[, END  := POS]
setkey(bim, CHR, START, END)

# ============================================================
# STEP 4: Load trans-eQTL windows (already built)
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 4: Load trans-eQTL windows ===\n")

trans_bed <- fread(file.path(BASE, "TRANS_windows_0.5Mb.nochr.bed"),
                   header = FALSE,
                   col.names = c("CHR", "START", "END"))
trans_bed[, CHR := as.integer(CHR)]
trans_bed <- trans_bed[!is.na(CHR)]
setkey(trans_bed, CHR, START, END)

cat("Trans-eQTL windows:", nrow(trans_bed), "\n")

# ============================================================
# STEP 5: Find CIS variants (array SNPs overlapping ENCODE)
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 5: Intersect array variants with ENCODE cCREs ===\n")



# ============================================================
# STEP 6: Find TRANS variants (array SNPs overlapping trans windows)
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 6: Intersect array variants with trans-eQTL windows ===\n")



# ============================================================
# STEP 7: Build combined REG file
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 7: Build REG annotation ===\n")



# ============================================================
# STEP 8: Save full annotation table
# ============================================================
cat("\n=== STEP 8: Save full annotation table ===\n")



cat("\nAnnotation breakdown:\n")

cat("\n=== DONE ===\n")
cat("Key output files:\n")
cat(" REG_array_variants.txt   <- use this going forward\n")
cat(" TRANS_array_variants.txt <- trans-eQTL only\n")
cat(" CIS_array_variants.txt   <- ENCODE cis only\n")
cat(" annotation/variant_annotation_full.csv.gz <- full table\n")
EOF
